topic: v9-PR-5 drop-in plugin contract + wicked-testing exemplar
conditional_concerns: CLAUDE.md pointer not added due to permission denial — Pi recommends tracking issue with assignee + target date before treating as resolved
non_blocking_findings: Bus event naming inconsistency: contract specifies colon-separated, wicked-testing exemplar emits dot-separated — alignment recommendation for wicked-testing v0.4
wicked-testing:test-strategy R1 PARTIAL (trigger language in manifest description) — SHARPEN recommendation for v0.4
Contract length 441 lines exceeds SKILL.md 200-line cap — acceptable for a reference doc, not a skill entry point
3-call wrapper test interpretive drift risk (Gemini) — centralized adjudication body would reduce subjectivity
Daemon forward-stability (Codex) — plugin authors may overfit to dispatch details before v8 lands
synthesis: APPROVE 4-1. Contract complete across all 5 plugin-author needs. Exemplar rigorous. Non-duplication test teachable. Forward-compatibility addressed via versioning. CLAUDE.md pointer gap is discoverability not correctness — Pi dissent is well-reasoned but the filing of a tracking issue resolves the risk without blocking merge.
